quests.title: Atlas Prime Rebuild
quests.desired_end_state: A verified Atlas Prime successor repository with one Athena-authored multi-file transaction language, Thread Engine as the normal construction workflow, Sword as the independent local fallback and recovery path, Spear and Arrow/Bow as Thread Engine intake modes, Noctua before every merge, Phoenix recovery proof, and an explicitly approved cutover from Atlas Codex.

emberline.current_gate: Stage 1 Prime C07 closure-source state is durable after merge; Prime remains SHADOW, Codex Workboard synchronization is Stage 2, and generated refresh remains separate.
completed_durable_work: Gate 7 Thread Engine activation is complete under mission-scoped, draft-PR-only boundaries.
C07 protected source-standard target merged into Prime SHADOW main at 1dd3d689931d52258f049a38546681c9498692dc and read back at blob 08a5fb5b9d27a6acb54cd971d0c31442f463b8c3.
Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
chat_only_or_uncertain: Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization is pending until the Stage 1 Prime blobs merge and are read back.
Generated-output refresh remains pending and separately gated.
Prime promotion, Codex retirement, and cutover remain unauthorized.
remaining_work: Execute Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization after Stage 1 Prime blob readback.
Run separate Prime and Codex generated refresh/checkpoint routes after source merges complete.
Prove Quest Board cutover and rollback before authority changes.
emberline.protected_boundary_posture: No raw Drive, finance, health, clinic, runtime, account, network, device, infrastructure, secret, or protected export evidence belongs in GitHub.
emberline.next_safe_action: Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization after Stage 1 readback.
emberline.next_approval_gate: Exact Stage 2 Codex Workboard PR authorization.
must_not_happen_yet: Do not refresh generated output before source merges complete.
Do not retire predecessors, promote Prime, retire Codex, or cut over without separate exact approval.
Do not treat this SHADOW Quest Board as canonical or execution authority.

campaigns.title: Atlas Codex to Prime Migration
campaigns.current_gate: C07 target and Stage 1 Prime closure-source state are durable after merge; Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization remains next.
blockers: Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization and separate generated refresh routes remain pending.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Execute Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization only after Stage 1 Prime blob readback.

campaigns.title: Google Drive Dependency Retirement
campaigns.current_gate: Read-only dependency retirement remains separate from C07 closure.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Continue only separately routed read-only dependency reconciliation.

campaigns.title: Atlas Change Path Convergence
campaigns.current_gate: Gate 7 complete; change-path convergence no longer blocks C07 closure/status work.
campaigns.next_safe_action: No further Gate 7 action; preserve evidence and proceed only through staged C07 closure/status and generated routes.

campaigns.title: Quest Board and Emberline Architecture
campaigns.current_gate: Prime Quest Board remains SHADOW; Stage 1 records C07 state while Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization remains pending.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Keep authority SHADOW until cutover and rollback are separately proven and approved.

completion_range.basis: Equal-weight conservative average across four required campaigns: Codex-to-Prime migration 22-32, Google Drive dependency retirement 10-25, Atlas change-path convergence 100-100, and Quest Board/Emberline architecture 50-60.

quests.next_safe_action: Execute Stage 2 Codex Workboard synchronization only after Stage 1 Prime closure-source blobs merge and are read back.
quests.next_approval_gate: Jayson approval of the scoped Stage 2 Codex Workboard PR after Stage 1 readback.
